message:
fix(tests): use sk-ant- prefix in Anthropic header capture tests

The bearer token detection logic treats any non-sk-ant- token as a
bearer token, sending it via Authorization header instead of X-API-Key.
Update test fixtures to use sk-ant-test-key so they exercise the
X-API-Key header path as intended.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
